# Appendix G: Firmware Binary Hex Dump

For the purpose of digital forensics and version control verification, the complete compiled machine code (Intel Hex Format) of the Smart Auditorium Controller (v1.0) is appended below. This ensures that the exact binary deployed can be verified against future audits.
